name: @sciforge/sci-modality-router
description: SciForge sci-modality router worker: translates non-text scientific inputs into natural-language evidence via an operator-configured native-to-text expert provider. Translate-only; never reasons. Called by @sciforge/model-router during input pre-extraction.

sciforge.packagingStrategy: optional Model-Router-managed worker: model weights and provider startup are not bundled into the desktop app; local expert startup requires SCIFORGE_ENABLE_LOCAL_EXPERT_PROVIDER=1 and externally supplied licensed weights.
